query:
UPDATE dialogs d
JOIN (
  SELECT m.dialogId, m.direction
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT dialogId, MAX(createdAt) as maxDate
    FROM messages GROUP BY dialogId
  ) latest ON m.dialogId = latest.dialogId AND m.createdAt = latest.maxDate
) last_msg ON d.id = last_msg.dialogId
SET d.status = 'waiting'
WHERE last_msg.direction = 'outgoing'
  AND d.lastMessageAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  AND d.status = 'open';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LPssBLFuVbNm9U.root --database bdpiDWPftxaP5joCkvKLNw --execute UPDATE dialogs d
JOIN (
  SELECT m.dialogId, m.direction
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT dialogId, MAX(createdAt) as maxDate
    FROM messages GROUP BY dialogId
  ) latest ON m.dialogId = latest.dialogId AND m.createdAt = latest.maxDate
) last_msg ON d.id = last_msg.dialogId
SET d.status = 'waiting'
WHERE last_msg.direction = 'outgoing'
  AND d.lastMessageAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  AND d.status = 'open';
